loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the current period; per-phase energy is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active power trend and average; reactive power is not directly measured by this UPS meter, so reactive bars and average are omitted.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing input and output active power; efficiency and loss metrics are derived from these values. Output power total has failed validation on this asset, so output readings may be unreliable or missing.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing input active power as a percentage of nominal output capacity — UPS does not log a dedicated 'load factor' or 'anomaly count' column, so these are derived or omitted.
